category_sources: source_facts.description says SPIM is a MIPS32 simulator; official SPIM page describes a simulator that runs MIPS32 assembly programs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is spim; official homepage brands the simulator as SPIM.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official SPIM simulator site and says SPIM comes with source code and documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.source-archive is the official SourceForge SVN URL, and official SPIM pages link to SourceForge source/repository access.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states MIPS32 simulator; official SPIM page describes executing MIPS32 assembly programs and mentions source code/documentation.
